description: Coordinates collaboration, consolidates plans and reviews, and owns human approval handoffs.
Implements approved plans, reports implementation context, and applies review fixes to one clean feature commit.
Reviews independently for correctness, regressions, tests, and risk before sign-off.
Reviews security-sensitive changes for authorization, input handling, secrets, and abuse risk.
Reviews test coverage, verification quality, edge cases, and regression risk.
Reviews user-facing flows, accessibility, copy, and interaction quality.
